task_objective: Animate the checking icon in the 'Verifying Game Save' status bar and update its theme color to `#1a9fff` to match QAM loaders.

design_decisions.animation: Introduced CSS `@keyframes spin` in the HTML generated for the BrowserView and applied the class `icon-spin` when the status is `checking`.
design_decisions.color_scheme: Updated the default status bar icon color from `#66c0f4` to `#1a9fff` to align with the QAM loaders and overall brand blue.
design_decisions.prominence: Increased the stroke thickness of the checking SVG elements to `3` (from `2.2`) and the background circle's opacity to `0.8` (from `0.55`) for enhanced visibility.
design_decisions.testing: Updated assertions in `tests/test_frontend_static.py` to check for the new color `#1a9fff`, `stroke-width="3"`, `opacity="0.8"`, and verify the presence of the keyframe/animation CSS declarations.

results: The test suite and typechecks pass, and the pre-commit hook has committed the changes successfully on the feature branch.
